title: Mechatronics Technician
description: Maintain, calibrate, and repair automated production equipment combining mechanical, electrical, and control systems on a busy manufacturing floor.

title: Senior Mechatronics Engineer
description: Lead integration of mechanical and electronic systems for next-generation robotic assembly lines, including PLC configuration and preventive maintenance planning.

title: Industrial Maintenance Manager
description: Own the maintenance strategy for a 24/7 production site, leading a team of 15 technicians, managing asset lifecycles, and driving reliability improvements.

title: Reliability Engineer
description: Apply reliability engineering practices to reduce unplanned downtime across a multi-site manufacturing network.

title: Industrial Automation Engineer
description: Design and deploy SCADA and HMI systems to automate discrete and process manufacturing operations.

title: OT/IIoT Systems Integrator
description: Bridge operational technology and IT networks, deploying IIoT gateways and integrating plant data into cloud dashboards.

title: UX Designer
description: Create elegant, accessible interfaces for a SaaS platform serving 500k users, from discovery research through high-fidelity Figma prototypes.

title: Product Designer
description: Own end-to-end product design for mobile banking app, conducting user research, wireframing concepts, and iterating through usability testing.

title: Full Stack Developer
description: Build and maintain customer-facing web applications and internal APIs, using modern JavaScript frameworks, RESTful services, and relational databases.

title: Backend Engineer
description: Design scalable microservices and REST APIs that power a high-traffic e-commerce platform, with focus on database modeling and software architecture.

title: Product Manager
description: Drive product strategy and roadmap for a B2B SaaS platform, partnering with engineering, design, and sales stakeholders to deliver measurable business outcomes.

title: Technical Product Manager
description: Translate complex analytics product requirements into clear specifications for engineering teams, leveraging deep understanding of data pipelines and ML workflows.

title: AI/ML Engineer
description: Research, train, and deploy state-of-the-art machine learning models for NLP and computer vision use-cases in production environments.

title: ML Platform Engineer
description: Build and maintain the infrastructure and tooling that enable data scientists to train, evaluate, and ship machine learning models at scale.
